subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who was in the eternity of eternities and shall ever be as He hath been. There is none other God but Him, the Self-Sufficient [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی کان فی ازل الازال و یکون بمثل ما قد کان لا اله الا هو الغنی
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @words vs deeds, @praise and encouragement
